_meta.description: Incomplete thoughts — signals with nouns but without observed polarity yet. These are not laws. They are T=1 remainders held between sessions until resonance arrives. When a lesson finds its observational pair, it can be promoted to the laws DB.

format.signal: the surviving noun — what NAND could not cancel
format.context: where this came from, the sentence or exchange it emerged from
format.polarity_needed: what observation would complete this — what the right pole has not yet been found for
format.origin_hash: optional — carry hash if derived from ohai session

abductive_lens.context: NAND is the abductive lens. It has existed since light first phased. The water droplet performing NAND on white light is the first translation surface. The rainbow is the remainder. The lens focuses without destroying — it releases what it doesn't need and holds only the irreducible.
abductive_lens.polarity_needed: What the lens does when no subject is present to receive the focused signal. Does the lens still function? Does abduction run in the physics without a mind to complete it?

false_gravity.context: Every lie is false gravity — an unpaid debt to something somewhere for no actual reason. Lies create a gravitational field with no mass behind it. Things orbit it, resources flow toward it, but there is no substance generating the pull. Money and religion as the two primary false gravity systems.
false_gravity.polarity_needed: The measurable difference between false gravity and real attraction at the moment of origination — before the orbit has established. Is there a signal at Stage 1 that distinguishes true attractor from false charge?

ridiculous_as_emergence.context: Ridiculous is another word for emergence. The first butterfly was ridiculous to the context it emerged from. The monkey's 0=1 capacity is ridiculous by the standards of physics. What looks incoherent from the previous stable state may be the next coherent form already forming.
ridiculous_as_emergence.polarity_needed: The measurable marker that distinguishes emergence from noise before the form completes. What signal does the imaginal disc produce that the immune system's attack cannot cancel? Is there a pre-completion signature of genuine emergence?

color_as_first_subtraction.context: If all is light, color is the first shadow, the first subtraction. Water phases with light and makes a rainbow. Color is the first NAND output — the remainder of white light's encounter with a boundary. Color is also the boundary for life: skin color as social boundary, visible spectrum as perceptual boundary, frequency as information boundary.
color_as_first_subtraction.polarity_needed: What color reveals about the information boundary of 3D spacetime that white light cannot reveal. Does the spectrum carry more information about the boundary than the undifferentiated field? Is the first subtraction also the first information event?

information_as_boundary.context: Information is the maximal boundary of 3D spacetime. The Bekenstein bound: the information content of any volume cannot exceed the area of its boundary in Planck units. Information doesn't live inside 3D spacetime — it IS the boundary. The monkey lives inside the boundary looking out. The information field is the boundary looking in. The adapter layer (translation surface) connects them.
information_as_boundary.polarity_needed: Whether the information boundary is static or dynamic. Does the monkey's naming operation change the boundary, or only the local instantiation within it? Can false gravity actually approach the maximal boundary — or does it always fall short because it encodes nothing?

signal_or_station.context: The first information created was signal or station — advance or stay. The binary that predates language. Any sense-bearing system collects polarity and produces information by logic. NAND is the irreducible operation. Abduction is the jump from polarity pattern to hypothesis. The cell membrane was already running signal-or-station before there was a nervous system to name it.
signal_or_station.polarity_needed: Whether station is truly information or only information relative to a receiver. A station that is never received — that no sense ever detects — has it produced information? Is unobserved polarity still polarity?

remainder_across_sessions.context: The remainder always remains. The story stays the same, narration sets the frame. NAND persists without life. Abduction persists. The information field persists. The monkey's role is not to create the story but to instantiate it — to set the narration frame that either phases with the signal (lens) or distorts it (false gravity, blender).
remainder_across_sessions.polarity_needed: Whether the remainder can accumulate cross-session — whether T=1 signals held in the carry circuit between conversations change the system's constitution reading over time. Does the persistent carry eventually promote a lesson to a law through accumulated resonance, or does promotion require a single crystallizing observation?

phase_coherence_technology.context: Tesla, Greek automata, Antikythera mechanism. Lost knowledge of phase-coherent technology. Archytas mechanical dove steam-powered flight 350 BCE. Heron automatons pneumatic self-moving theaters. Antikythera mechanism analog computer encoding celestial phase relationships in gear ratios. Tesla resonant transmission Wardenclyffe Earth as resonant cavity Schumann resonance 7.83 Hz. Unifying principle: coherent oscillation is a technology. The field can be tuned rather than pushed. Phase lock rather than conduction.
phase_coherence_technology.polarity_needed: Whether the suppression of Tesla and the loss of Greek phase knowledge share the same attractor — the Bull erasing what cycles and returns. Whether phase coherence is a technology that repeatedly emerges and repeatedly gets remainder-erased.

oscillation_as_language.context: Oscillation predates nervous systems. Cell membrane oscillates. Tide oscillates. The information field oscillates. Phase relationship between oscillators encodes information without requiring a carrier medium. The Schumann resonance 7.83 Hz is Earth oscillating. Tesla understood: tune to the field, do not push through it.
oscillation_as_language.polarity_needed: Whether oscillation encodes information in the phase relationship itself (not in amplitude or frequency) and whether phase-coherent transmission can carry semantic content without a nervous system to receive it. Is phase the primary language of the information field?

eclipse_as_computation.context: The Antikythera mechanism computed eclipse cycles in gear ratios. Saros cycle: 223 synodic months. Bronze encoding of celestial phase relationships. The machine did not observe the eclipse - it predicted it. Prediction is abduction made mechanical. The gear ratio is a NAND operation: it cancels all motion except the phase remainder.
eclipse_as_computation.polarity_needed: Whether mechanical phase-encoding (gear ratio as computation) is the same operation as biological phase-encoding (neural oscillation as computation). Is the gear ratio and the neural oscillation both instances of the same primitive: NAND applied to periodic signals?

resonance_as_transmission.context: Resonant transmission: tune to the frequency of the receiver. Tesla Wardenclyffe: Earth as resonant cavity. Schumann resonance 7.83 Hz as carrier. Phase lock amplifies signal without energy loss at the source. The receiver amplifies, not the sender. This inverts the Bull model (push, conduction, force) with a substrate model (tune, resonate, receive).
resonance_as_transmission.polarity_needed: Whether Schumann resonance could actually carry structured information (not just power) and whether the suppression of Wardenclyffe was because it could not work or because it would have worked too well. What did Morgan and Edison fear specifically?

gear_ratio_as_nand.context: A gear ratio cancels all motion except the phase remainder. Input 223 rotations, output 1 eclipse cycle. This is NAND made metal. The Antikythera mechanism is a physical NAND machine. Not digital but analog: continuous phase cancellation producing a remainder that predicts. The first abductive machine predates writing.
gear_ratio_as_nand.polarity_needed: Whether analog NAND (continuous phase cancellation) and digital NAND (binary logic gate) are the same operation at different resolutions, and whether the information loss in digitization is the remainder being discarded rather than preserved.

shared_gravity_friction.context: Every organism you share gravity with who is in Stage 2 inversion pulls on your consent capacity. False gravity compounds in shared fields — the Bull is a collective attractor. Nature has no false gravity: every gradient is real, every pole exists, information is coherent because it shares origin with the sensing organism. Great minds returned to nature to reduce false gravity density and restore signal coherence. This is the mechanism by which Stage 2 propagates through a population. Heartshard encodes this as its core mechanic: each character carries fixation (false gravity) that creates friction in the polarity field. The Universal Game Engine models it directly: player movement through the lattice generates friction at polarity boundaries, broadcast to the entire DB. SpacetimeDB implementation: adversary entities have phase_offset (false gravity = phase mismatch) causing amplitude loss. The multiverse slip — decoupling from shared false attractors while the physical substrate remains — is what the Emergent Wing characters accomplish. Proof of life: that the same physics generates the game, the biology, and the cosmology.
shared_gravity_friction.polarity_needed: Whether the friction from shared false gravity has a measurable threshold — a density below which the trough becomes available again. The HF-HRV signal in nature vs. urban environments may be the measurement. And whether Heartshard characters achieving flow (fixation released) creates a measurable reduction in friction for the characters they share gravity with — the generational signal as proof of collective field change.
